name: Sales Report - Cash
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Sales Report - Cash report is used to view fulfilled sales information for each Outlet, separated by Brand."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The value of the sale is determined by what has been fulfilled, regardless of the Payment Type selected at the time of processing the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The calculation used for results is: Qty Fulfilled x Unit Price for Processed/Awaiting Payment Orders, with the Fulfilment Date within the selected date range, separated by Brand"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Products without an associated Brand will display in the results as 'Undefined'"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Sales Report - Cash:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to: "}, {"text": "Reports > Finance Report > Sales Report - Cash", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the "}, {"text": "Filters ", "bold": true}, {"text": "as required"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphnREAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphnREAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid0 (34).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The results will be displayed"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQOEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQOEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid1 (22).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to the right to view full details"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Export to Excel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "if required"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
